name: Contacts
description: Interact with macOS Contacts.app - get phone numbers, find contacts by name or phone

tools.name: find_contact_by_name
tools.description: Find full contact details (phone, email) for a contact by name

tools.name: find_contact_by_phone
tools.description: Find a contact name by their phone number

tools.name: find_number
tools.description: Find phone numbers for a contact by name

tools.name: get_all_numbers
tools.description: Get all contacts and their phone numbers
